title: Reverb Compass
description: Adds waypoint teleportation to the game as a vanilla-esque feature.
body:
## 🔊 Reverb Compass
**This mod adds a new item that allows the player to recall themselves back to a connected lodestone. This mod aims to add waypoints, but balanced around a vanilla-esque mechanic.**

Craft a reverb compass by crafting a lodestone compass and an echo shard. Use the reverb compass to recall yourself back on top of the lodestone that the compass is linked to for a quick option for travel!

![Reverb Compass recipe which uses a Lodestone Compass and an Echo Shard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5aeec136a185e789830a9ad4e40edf9f30f7b66c.png)

## ⚙️ Modpack Usage
Reverb Compass is free to be used in any custom mod packs as long as credit is provided. Compatibility with other mods has not been tested for.
## 🐛 Issues
If you happen to experience any issues while using this mod, please report it to our [GitHub issue tracker](https://github.com/Sir-Cow/reverb-compass/issues)! Please be as clear as possible when reporting any bugs or issues.
